SVOR Model @mcfNBA · Shooting Value Over Replacement · College Basketball
3,275 player-seasons Season 2025–26 Min 50 shot attempts Source: Barttorvik
Higher SVOR = better shot-making — converts opportunities above what a league-average shooter would on the same looks  ·  Higher xPTS = better shot diet — gets to higher-value locations (rim, open 3) rather than contested mid-range  ·  Pos%ile = percentile rank within full player pool  ·  Negative SVOR = below-average finishing on their looks, not necessarily a bad player
